title: Cobblemon Generations SMP
description: A Modpack used for Cobblemon Generations SMP.
body:
A Modpack for the Cobblemon Generations SMP

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🧬 CORE FEATURES 

FAKEMON SYSTEM

On this SMP there are Pokémon called Fakémon.

These Fakémon are made from Pokémon like Infernape or Garchomp and they are given a new ability that already exists in other Pokémon.

They are also given custom STAB moves that they usually don't obtain.

Here is the thing:

👉 Each Fakémon is unique there is one of each in the entire server.

👉 One player can own each Fakémon so you will have something that no one else has.

You do not just catch Pokémon you own something that's truly one-of-a-kind.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⚔ GENERATION GUILD SYSTEM

Players can join a guild based on a Pokémon generation, such as Gen 1 which is Kanto or Gen 2 which is Johto.

The guilds are based on the generations of Pokémon, including:

Gen 1. Kanto
Gen 2. Johto
Gen 3. Hoenn
Gen 4. Sinnoh
Gen 5. Unova
Gen 6. Kalos
Gen 7. Alola
Gen 8. Galar
Gen 9. Paldea
Gen 10. Hisui

The Gen 10 guild is special it is based on the Hisui region Pokédex and it acts like a unique tenth generation with its own identity.

👉 You can only use Pokémon from your guilds generation so you have to choose

👉 Each guild has its strengths and weaknesses and its own strategy so you have to work together with your guild members.

🔥 GUILD WARS

Guilds can challenge each other in war events, where you fight for control of a Pokémon species from another generation.

If you win you can steal a Pokémon species from another generation. That Pokémon becomes usable by your entire guild for a limited time.

If you lose:

You get a Protection Token, which allows you to protect one Pokémon from being stolen next cycle.

You also get a Raid Tower Token, which allows you to challenge a guilds tower.


🏰 TOWER SYSTEM

There are towers scattered across the world and each tower has Pokémon from every generation.

Each Tower resides a Legendary/Mythical Pokemon which you can use along side other pokemon which you can use even if they're not in your generation.

If you claim a tower first your guild gets access to all the Pokémon inside.

You get to keep the tower for a month. Nobody can attack it until the next guild war cycle.

If you lose the tower you can challenge it again using a special Raid Token.

Each tower has a variety of Pokémon, which gives guilds unique opportunities for strategy and roster diversity.

💥 RAID TOWER BATTLES

If a guild uses a Raid Tower Token they can pick a tower to challenge.

The current tower guild. They get to choose the battle format, either 6v6 or Double Battle.

If the attacking guild wins the defending guild has to give up ownership of the tower and loses access, to all the Pokémon

But if the defending guild wins nothing happens they get to keep the tower and the Pokémon.

Towers reward exploration, strategy and roster diversity making every claim and raid

🏆 EVENTS & CONTENT

We have a lot of events and content including:

Fakémon drop events

Player-run events and tournaments

Guild competitions

Special events

🎯 WHAT MAKES THIS SMP DIFFERENT

You can own one-of-a-kind Pokémon, which's really cool.

We have custom abilities and moves that you will not see else.

We have guild rivalries, which makes the game more exciting.

We have a tenth guild, which is based on the Hisui region and it is not seen on other servers.
